quarantine.note: Revisit route_q44-plus because ACE/MTA plus route ids may be SBS-coded dataset route ids; do not promote do-not-merge against Q44-SBS yet.

original_do_not_merge.reason: Distinct route variants sharing base route Q44: route_bronx-flushing-jamaica-sbs is Q44-SBS (Select Bus Service) while route_q44-plus is Q44+ (plus-label). The ACE dataset dictionary lists Q44+ as a distinct item from Q44-SBS. Negative signals explicitly flag 'variant mismatch: ace-dataset,sbs vs plus-label'. The shared identity key 'route_q44' is a weak alias derived from the base route number, not evidence of same canonical identity.

Distinct route variants sharing base route Q44: route_bronx-flushing-jamaica-sbs is Q44-SBS (Select Bus Service with specific Bronx-Flushing-Jamaica corridor) while route_q44-queens is the plain Q44 local bus route (referenced in queens_addendum_equity_evaluation_appendix_d with 'Q44 Extension to Fordham Plaza'). Negative signals flag 'variant mismatch: ace-dataset,sbs vs unknown'. The shared identity key 'route_q44' is a weak alias.

Distinct route variants sharing base route Q44: route_q44-plus is Q44+ (plus-label variant from ACE dataset dictionary) while route_q44-queens is the plain Q44 local bus route. Negative signals flag 'variant mismatch: plus-label vs unknown'. No evidence connects Q44+ to the Q44 local route described in the queens addendum.

original_rationale: All three records share base route Q44 but represent distinct service variants: Q44-SBS (Select Bus Service on Bronx-Flushing-Jamaica corridor), Q44+ (plus-label variant from ACE dataset), and Q44 (plain local route from queens addendum). The packet's own negative signals confirm variant mismatches. The validator duplicate_global_identity flags are based on the weak shared alias 'route_q44' which is a base-route label, not evidence of same canonical identity. No evidence connects any two records as the same route variant.
required_follow_up: Resolve blocker before creating accepted merge/do-not-merge overrides.
Do not apply this packet directly to data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
